summary: Iteration 12 — Validated P0 bug fixes: Orquestador/System Logs/Welcome now show real data, new /admin/orders/{id}/retry + /admin/workspaces/{id}/suspend endpoints work, 'Accesos & Grupos' sidebar shortcut navigates to /admin/neovdi?tab=access and pre-selects the Acceso tab. 13/14 backend pytest passed (1 skipped — no running workspace to suspend in this env). Frontend: all 8 Welcome enrollment-info fields populated with real Zitadel data (org=Neogenesys, 22 users), badge 'Zitadel conectado', retry button correctly gated by order selection, system-logs table shows source badges + prefixed messages (previously empty — fixed).
action_items: (None blocking) Consider surfacing retry_count + last_retry_at inside the order card so admin sees retry feedback.

(Nice-to-have) Orquestador /admin page currently lists workspaces[] via /api/admin/workspaces — confirm workspace-select in suspender section is populated once a tenant has running VMs (fallback path untested in this env since no running workspaces exist).
critical_code_review_comments: admin_orchestrator returns dummy DEMO orders when no real orders exist — is_demo=True is set correctly, and the UI respects it (retry button disabled on DEMO). Good.

admin_order_retry does NOT validate that status != 'completed' before re-queueing — retrying a completed order silently flips it back to 'provisioning'. Add a guard: if order.status == 'completed', raise 409.

admin_workspace_suspend kills sessions but does not terminate the actual LXD VM instance. If the intent is to free resources, add `await lxd_client.stop_instance(ws.id)` or document that 'suspend' is logical-only.
system-logs classify() maps 'retry' → level='warn', but a successful retry audit_log is informational — consider excluding 'retry' from warn set, or scope warn to 'retry_failed'.

zitadel_my_org catches all exceptions into status='error' — good defensive behavior; but swallowed httpx.HTTPStatusError will not surface 401s from an expired PAT to the admin UI except as the generic 'error' badge. Consider including status_code in the error field.
WelcomePage goto-access-btn originally navigated to /admin/neovdi (no query) — fixed in this iteration to include ?tab=access so it matches the sidebar behavior.

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/13 executed, 1 skipped due to empty env)

test_credentials: admin@windesk.cloud / Admin123! (admin role) — login response key is access_token (NOT token). Bypass cards work on /login by clicking user email text.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_RetryOrg market_order for retry_count verification (persists in db.market_orders; safe to leave — consumed by retry endpoint only).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features validated. Login: POST /api/auth/login returns {access_token, user}. Admin after login lands on /dashboard (NOT /welcome) — navigate explicitly to /welcome for enrollment-info testing. SSE EventSource prevents networkidle, use wait_until='domcontentloaded'. Backend file /app/backend/tests/test_admin_orchestrator_p0.py is regression-ready — run with `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest backend/tests/test_admin_orchestrator_p0.py -v`. The Zitadel my-org test REQUIRES network access to beyondcloud-nxm7ab.us1.zitadel.cloud — it may return status='error' in offline CI, but structure is still validated.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs; only one small UX fix applied to goto-access-btn (missing ?tab=access query param). Original behavior: clicking 'Configurar accesos' on Welcome landed on NeoVDI default 'Conexiones' tab instead of 'Acceso' tab. Fixed by appending ?tab=access to navigate() call, matching Sidebar behavior.
